meta.title: The Witch Doctor vs  The Engineer
meta.description:
Darren Highfill from S4x12 looks at ICS and IT security standards and determines if they are based on security guru's and tribal knowledge or true Security Engineering. The conclusion is that much ICS security consulting is more similar to a Witch Doctor rather than an Engineer.

He goes over the engineering and scientific discipline and then discusses how ASAP-SG has added use cases, failure mode analysis and state diagrams over time in an effort to meet the engineering discipline that so many SCADA and DCS engineers should demand.
